question_text: A cyclist travels 8 kilometres in 20 minutes. Calculate her speed in metres per second (m/s).
explanation: First convert units: 8 km = 8000 m and 20 minutes = 1200 seconds. Then use speed = distance ÷ time: 8000 m ÷ 1200 s = 6.67 m/s. This requires applying the speed formula and converting between different units.
